site.title: Celestia Island
site.subtitle: A constellation of open-source projects
site.description: Exploring multi-agent orchestration, WASM component models, zero-trust authentication, and interactive debugging tools.

entelecheia.description: An exec-only microkernel design where the LLM sees only 3 tools, with 12+ agents invoked through ES module imports in an IEPL TypeScript layer. Features TUI, CLI, Cosmos/IEPL runtime, 60+ Rust crates.

shittim.description: Arona (Chat UI with streaming) & Plana (Admin panel with RBAC), plus a Rust+Axum backend. Scaffolds Tauri desktop & mobile apps.

tairitsu.description: Revolutionary Rust web framework targeting WASI via the Component Model. Unifies browser & server rendering through WIT interfaces with VDOM+hooks.

hikari.description: Rust UI framework blending Chinese aesthetics with sci-fi design. 40+ components, type-safe SCSS, glow effects, 9-language i18n, 660+ named colors.

aoba.description: Rust CLI/TUI for Modbus RTU debugging with physical serial ports, master/slave modes, virtual ports, and HTTP/MQTT bridging.

kirino.description: Generic trait-based auth implementing ANSI INCITS 359-2004 RBAC with role inheritance, SoD constraints, and multi-credential support.
